Package org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic

package org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis. This package includes microscopic car-following models (IDM) and lane-changing logic (MOBIL), supporting architectural and urban planning for transportation infrastructure.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.episteme.social.architecture
    Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
    org.episteme.social.architecture.lift
    Provides mathematical models and discrete simulations for vertical transportation systems (elevators/lifts).
    org.episteme.social.architecture.loaders
    Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.architecture.loaders package in the Episteme library.
    org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Provides mathematical and computational models for urban planning, land-use analysis, and urban climatology.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Road
    Represents a physical roadway segment within a traffic network.
    TrafficSimulator
    Microscopic traffic simulation engine implementing the Intelligent Driver Model (IDM) for longitudinal car-following and MOBIL for lateral lane-changing logic.
    TrafficSimulator.Car
    Represents a single vehicle in the traffic simulation.
    Vehicle
    Represents a generic vehicle entity within a macro or microscopic traffic system.
